zh.title: 乔治·奥威尔文学预言全集 - 《1984》与《动物庄园》中的16条预言与验证 | Orwell Prophecies
zh.description: 英国作家乔治·奥威尔（1903-1950）在《1984》和《动物庄园》等作品中对极权主义、大规模监控、语言操控、历史篡改等社会问题的预言性警告。这些文学预言在数十年后惊人地成为现实。
zh.keywords: 乔治奥威尔,1984,动物庄园,奥威尔预言,老大哥,电幕,新话,双重思想,极权主义,监控社会,思想控制,George Orwell
zh.ogTitle: 乔治·奥威尔文学预言全集 | Orwell Literary Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 英国作家乔治·奥威尔在《1984》和《动物庄园》中的预言性警告——大规模监控、语言操控、历史篡改、极权主义——如何在数十年后成为现实。
zh.twitterDescription: 奥威尔《1984》中的16条文学预言与现实验证：电幕与监控摄像头、新话与政治正确、老大哥与NSA棱镜计划。

en.title: George Orwell Literary Prophecies - 16 Predictions from 1984 & Animal Farm | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: George Orwell (1903-1950) foresaw mass surveillance, thought control, language manipulation, and historical revisionism in his dystopian novels '1984' and 'Animal Farm'. These literary prophecies have become remarkably prescient decades later.
en.keywords: George Orwell,1984,Animal Farm,Orwell predictions,Big Brother,telescreen,Newspeak,doublethink,totalitarianism,surveillance state,thought control,dystopia
en.ogTitle: George Orwell Literary Prophecies - Predictions from 1984 & Animal Farm
en.ogDescription: 16 prophetic warnings from George Orwell's dystopian works — mass surveillance, Newspeak, historical revisionism, perpetual war — verified against real-world events from NSA to social media.
en.twitterDescription: 16 literary prophecies from Orwell's 1984 & Animal Farm. Telescreens became CCTV & smartphones. Newspeak became political language. Big Brother became the NSA.
